claim_boundary: ScenarioBelief-style uncertainty metadata can change one opt-in stream_gap planner-input decision on one fixture.

validation.command: uv run ruff check robot_sf/planner/stream_gap.py tests/planner/test_stream_gap_planner.py
uv run ruff format --check robot_sf/planner/stream_gap.py tests/planner/test_stream_gap_planner.py

limitations: No runtime observation-builder bridge is included.
Single-fixture smoke cannot support planner-performance or safety claims.
Thresholds are diagnostic defaults and are not calibrated.
next_step: Connect a runtime ScenarioBelief producer or observation builder to the optional stream_gap uncertainty sidecar and rerun as an end-to-end smoke.
